prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约302名→203名→240名→830名→1984名，整体呈持续后移趋势，尤其2024年扩招后位次从240名大幅后移至830名，2025年进一步 后移至1984名，近两年累计后移约1744名；2025年基准位次约1984名；本省物理类计划2021年3人、2022年5人、2023年3人、2024年14人、2025年18人；2026年 计划23人，较2025年扩招约27.8%，扩招幅度较大，对位次有后移作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；复旦大学软科主榜排名第5（2021–2026年稳定），属全 国顶尖高校层次；复旦大学上海医学院为复旦大学医学部独立招生，医学实力位居全国前列；2026年复旦大学声誉评价偏负面（涉及师德师风事件），但抖音综 合热度排名第4（高热），短视频曝光量大；复旦大学上海医学院作为医学独立招生单位，声誉影响相对有限；未见明显投档断档记录；临床医学A、公共卫生与 预防医学A+、护理学A-、药学A、生物学A+，医学学科实力极强；招生专业覆盖临床医学（八年制/五年制）、口腔医学、基础医学、药学、预防医学、护理学等，与优势学科高度 匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业持续高热推荐（2024年），口腔医学推荐（72.31），护理学推荐（68.61），医学类专业整体报考热度高；湖南省物理类考生2021年20.6万人→2025年32.0万人→2026年34.7万人（+8.4%），考生规 模持续扩大，竞争加剧；复旦大学上海医学院位于上海市，对湖南考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在本省招生 占比从2024年约4.08%（20人/490人总计划）逐步提升，2026年计划23人，外省招生比例较高，跨省竞争格局稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年扩招约2 7.8%（供需弹性主值约2315名）、湖南省物理类考生增长8.4%加剧竞争、医学专业热度持续高位等因素，在2025年基准1984名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约2345名， 区间2064–2626名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制正谊明道班）
- 临床医学（卓越临床医师班）
- 口腔医学（拔尖班）
- 口腔医学
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 基础医学（尚医拔尖班）
- 药学（含药学拔尖班、产教融合班）
- 预防医学（含预防医学拔尖班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 护理学（含护理学卓越班）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2064–2626名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档护理学保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<2064名）可重点冲击临床医学八年制或口腔医学 拔尖班等一档专业；位次接近区间上限（>2626名）建议以二档药学/预防医学为主，三档护理学作为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 302 → 203 → 240 → 830 → 1984, showing a continuous backward trend. Especially after the 2024 expansion, the ranking significantly moved from 240 to 830, and further to 1984 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1744 positions in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1984. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plans were 3 in 2021, 5 in 2022, 3 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 18 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 23, an increase of about 27.8% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and will further push rankings backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; Fudan University ranks 5th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (stable from 2021 to 2026), belonging to the top tier of national universities. Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is an independent enrollment unit of Fudan University's medical department, with medical strength ranking among the top in the country. In 2026, Fudan University's reputation evaluation is slightly negative (involving teacher ethics incidents), but its overall Douyin popularity ranks 4th (high heat), with high short video exposure. As an independent medical enrollment unit, the reputation impact on Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is relatively limited. No obvious enrollment gaps have been observed. Clinical Medicine is rated A, Public Health and Preventive Medicine A+, Nursing A-, Pharmacy A, Biology A+, indicating extremely strong medical disciplines. The enrollment majors include Clinical Medicine (8-year/5-year), Stomatology, Basic Medicine, Pharmacy, Preventive Medicine, Nursing, etc., highly matching its advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine continues to be highly recommended (2024), Stomatology recommended (72.31), Nursing recommended (68.61), with overall high application heat for medical majors. The number of Hunan Physics Category examinees increased from 206,000 in 2021 to 320,000 in 2025, and is projected to be 347,000 in 2026 (+8.4%), with continuous expansion of the examinee scale and intensified competition. Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal to Hunan examinees. The proportion of its enrollment in this province has gradually increased from about 4.08% in 2024 (20 out of 490 total plan), with 23 planned for 2026. The proportion of out-of-province enrollment is relatively high, and the cross-provincial competition pattern is stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 expansion of about 27.8% (supply-demand elasticity main value approximately 2315), the 8.4% increase in Hunan Physics Category examinees intensifying competition, and the persistently high popularity of medical majors, the ranking is expected to continue moving backward based on the 2025 baseline of 1984. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2345, with a range of 2064 to 2626.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (8-Year Zhengyi Mingdao Class)
- Clinical Medicine (Outstanding Clinical Physician Class)
- Stomatology (Top Talent Class)
- Stomatology
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Basic Medicine (Shangyi Top Talent Class)
- Pharmacy (Including Pharmacy Top Talent Class, Industry-Education Integration Class)
- Preventive Medicine (Including Preventive Medicine Top Talent Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Nursing (Including Nursing Excellence Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2064–2626, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 Nursing as a safety option. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2064), focus on impacting Tier 1 majors such as Clinical Medicine 8-Year or Stomatology Top Talent Class. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>2626), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 Pharmacy/Preventive Medicine, with Tier 3 Nursing as a stable choice.
